2026-07-01 refresh: screens/web-create-plan.html updated and 6 equipment photos (assets/equip-*.webp, 294x294) added to the create-plan equipment step (Paso 4). App-side asset copies live in apps/web/public/equipment/. UI wiring is owned by the create-plan wizard work (issue #54); the equipment taxonomy (design's flat gimnasio/maquinas/barras/mancuernas/bandas/peso-corporal set vs the app's location-scoped EQUIPMENT_BY_LOCATION) is a pending data-model decision.

2026-07-01 full-coverage pass: 5 additional per-item equipment photos (assets/equip-{dominadas,kettlebell,banco,prensa,trx}.webp, 294x294) snapshotted to decorate the remaining app equipment values (pull_up_bar, kettlebell, bench, leg_press, suspension_trainer). Combined with the 6 earlier assets these cover 10 of the 11 EQUIPMENT_BY_LOCATION values; smith_machine has no matching source image among the 15 candidates and is intentionally left photo-less rather than mislabeled with the cable/pulley equip-maquinas image.

The live source carries 15 equipment webp images total: equip-{gimnasio,mancuernas,bandas,peso-corporal,barras,maquinas,dominadas,kettlebell,banco,prensa,trx,mancuernas-fijas,banco-alt,bandas-alt,dominadas-outdoor}. 11 are snapshotted here (gimnasio is a location-level image; the 10 per-item covers plus equip-gimnasio). The -alt / -outdoor / mancuernas-fijas variants were not pulled because a cleaner primary already covers each value.
